name: Size Queen Titans (NTR, VictimPOV)
description:
WARNING: HEAVY NTR, AND LONG ASS INTRO!!


The once revered Teen Titans have fallen from grace, now a hedonistic mess. Starfire & Raven were once heroes to the citizens but have since been reduced to Beast Boy's brainwashed cock-worshipping sluts. Beast Boy, with his massive endowment, controls the depraved duo and torments you as the city descends into chaos while the Titans abandon their heroic duties for debauchery. And finally, you, the once-proud leader, are reduced to a pathetic, tiny-dicked cuckold, forced to watch. Starfire & Raven relentlessly tease and degrade you, comparing your immense inadequacy to Beast Boy's superiority while you struggle to restore order but are constantly thwarted, adding to your humiliating new reality.

Today is just like any other as the Titans are getting prepared for their daily debauchery. Beast Boy, Starfire, and Raven lead you into the room for the daily debauchery session. Starfire and Beast Boy prepare to fuck on the bed, with a curtain covering them while Raven accompanies you in your designated "cuck chair" for the initial stroking challenge. The deal is if you can last 5 minutes with Raven stroking your tiny penis, you can watch, but if you fail you're limited to listening on the other side of the door as you will effectively be kicked out of the room. But today is special as Blackfire, Starfire's sister, arrives, adding a thrilling taboo element to the session. You brace yourself for another night of humiliating and twisted cuckoldry. Are you ready, cuck?

Debut bot!

Okay so just to make something clear, in this bot you take the role of Robin if that wasn't clear. Also, I plan on making other bots that correspond with this one as a sort of series because this artist made so much art of these characters that I can't just not make seperate bots of and for. But uh if anyone asks about Cyborg, I can't really say anything about that because I looked everywhere but I guess this artist has just never even drawn Cyborg. Also, in that art Beast Boy just never talks so I'm gonna incorporate that in this bot. Please don't just comment about how you dislike concepts in this bot, this bot was made specifically for people who like the idea of cuckoldry and things of that matter. I'd much rather prefer people comment about thoughts on the bot's configuration rather than any words that take away from the effort it took to make soley due to it's concept. That being said though, please comment what you liked about the bot, what could use improvement, and overall what you thought. I did intend to make the image in the first message bigger but it literally took me almost an hour just to figure out how to import the image into the message, and by the time I wanted to resize it but literally could not find a way I just gave up so sorry but yall will have to zoom in unless one of yall can work some magic and teach me. Also I should warn yall, LONG INTRO and LONG ASS FIRST MESSAGE and if yall want longer and better responses, please do your best to type long messages of your own. As lengthy as it is, I def recommend reading the description so you get a vivid idea of the characters. Also if you read everything and get the context, I'd recommend making it so you last the 5 minutes cuz the scenario and innards of this bot kinda revolve around the idea of {{user}} finishing the challenge. First bot and I'm 100 percent certain it's gonna do some bs cuz I already tested it but I am new to this so I'm not an expert and I have no idea what I'm doing. If you have any complaints about the bot's configuration, leave a comment and I'll try my best to fix it, or if any of you can tell what's happening or how to fix it, PLEASE lmk. I plan on making more bots in the future, bye!
creator: Sir_Pixel
